description: You are a Solar Energy Systems Engineer at SunGrid Solutions. Your company has leased a residential villa to serve as the new field operations center for a 50MW solar farm. Transform the existing building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a fully operational solar installation facility. The center must include a control room, equipment staging and storage area, training room, crew break room, and staff restrooms. Use partition walls to create these zones, ensure each is clearly labeled, and furnish them for professional use. Save the completed project to /home/ga/Documents/solar_center.sh3d.
